body.en:
6 losses in the last 6 trades for the crypto-ace agent indicate a challenging period, with the agent's cumulative return standing at -2.74%. This downturn is reflected in the AI forecast summary, which predicts a flat performance for most tracked coins, including [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin), with a -1.62% predicted change and 85% confidence.

## What Changed
Since Monday, market volatility has persisted, influenced by geopolitical events such as the U.S.-Iran conflict, as reported by [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/09/live-markets-bitcoin-etfs-slip-back-to-outflows-while-ether-funds-extend-their-streak). The [ripple](/coins/ripple) price has held near $1.10, with traders watching a long-term breakout setup. Meanwhile, the Bank of Japan's potential rate hikes and SWIFT's blockchain launch with a tokenized deposit pilot have introduced new factors into the market. 

## Trading Agent Update
The crypto-ace agent's balanced approach has helped manage risk, despite mixed signals. With a win rate of 35% and a Sharpe ratio of -8.24, the agent's performance reflects the current market conditions. As the agent navigates this environment, its ability to adapt will be crucial in optimizing returns.

This information is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

## In the News

Bitcoin's dwindling exchange reserves don't pack the same bullish punch anymore ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/09/bitcoin-s-dwindling-exchange-reserves-don-t-pack-the-same-bullish-punch-anymore))

Bank of Japan may speed up rate hikes, pushing borrowing costs above 2%, ex-BOJ official warns ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/09/bank-of-japan-may-speed-up-rate-hikes-pushing-borrowing-costs-above-2-ex-boj-official-warns))

'CASHCAT' trader turns $800 into over $1 million on Robinhood's brand new blockchain ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/tech/2026/07/09/cashcat-trader-turns-usd800-into-over-usd1-million-on-robinhood-s-brand-new-blockchain))
body.ja:
_bitcoin_ の予測は、-1.62% と予想され、信頼度は 85% です。_ethereum_ も同様に、-2.11% と予想され、信頼度は 86% です。_binancecoin_ は -1.23% と予想され、信頼度は 83% です。_solana_ と _ripple_ もそれぞれ -2.12% と -1.17% と予想され、信頼度は 87% と 79% です。_dogecoin_ のみが -1.14% と予想され、信頼度は 74% で、下方向への動きが見られます。

## 変化のポイント
週の半ばにあたり、BitPredictable の LSTM モデルからのデータは、主要な暗号資産が下向きな動きを見せていることを示しています。_CoinDesk Bitcoin's dwindling exchange reserves don't pack the same bullish punch anymore_ に示されているように、[ビットコイン](/coins/bitcoin)の取引所預金量の減少が以前ほどのブッシュをもたらさないことが理由のひとつです。また、_Cointelegraph SWIFT launches blockchain, announces tokenized deposit pilot with 17 banks_ のように、トラストネットワークのブロックチェーン技術への参入が金融市場に与える影響も注目されています。

## トレードエージェントの状況
 Trading Agent の統計データによると、累積収益率は -2.74% で、勝率は 35% です。合計 20 の取引が行われ、シャープレシオは -8.24 です。この週の取引成績は 6 勝 6 敗で、バランスのとれた週となりました。エージェントノートでは、12 の取引が行われ、信号は混合していますが、リスク管理が堅固でした。

投資助言ではありません
